component.name: Goshapps Downloader
component.summary: A fast, modern download manager powered by Rust

description.p: Goshapps Downloader is a fast, modern download manager built with Rust and GTK4. It supports HTTP/HTTPS downloads, BitTorrent protocol, and magnet links, giving you full control over your files.
Your privacy matters. Goshapps Downloader includes no telemetry and operates entirely local-only — your download activity stays on your machine and is never sent anywhere.
